data.title: WeRide and Grab Officially Launch Singapore's First Autonomous Public Ride Service in Punggol
data.description: Today, WeRide and Grab have announced the official launch of the Ai.R (Autonomously Intelligent Ride) service in Punggol, Singapore. The service is now available to the public, marking the beginning of autonomous ride-hailing operations in the area.

data.title: Hugel to enter ECM-based injectable market with aesthetic portfolio expansion
data.description: Hugel has obtained the rights for selling CellREDM, an injectable utilizing ECM, within the country. They intend to partner with Hans Biomed and capitalize on their botulinum toxin and dermal filler offerings to drive growth. The company, based in SEOUL, South Korea, is set to forge collaborations to boost its product portfolio and establish CellREDM as a key revenue stream.

data.title: DENARIUS METALS FILES 2025 ANNUAL FILINGS ON SEDAR+
data.description: On March 31, 2026, Denarius Metals Corp. (Cboe CA: DMET) (OTCQX: DNRSF) disclosed the submission of its audited consolidated financial statements, management's discussion and analysis (MD&A), and Annual Information Form (AIF). The company made this announcement without specifying the source.

data.title: Mitsubishi Electric Group Launches New Corporate Philosophy
data.description: Today, Mitsubishi Electric Corporation (TOKYO: 6503) introduced its new corporate philosophy called Our Philosophy. This initiative aims to modernize the long-standing corporate values of the Mitsubishi Electric group. The company's goal is to evolve into an "Innovative Company" that creates value through innovative ideas and a readiness to take risks. This transformation will involve managing various global enterprises to spur growth and tackle societal and environmental challenges.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Trump To Speak To Nation On Iran; UAE Willing To Help Force Hormuz Open
data.description: The President is considering withdrawing from a potential war with Iran, regardless of the Strait of Hormuz remaining shut. In response, the stock market experienced a significant surge while oil prices exhibited a varied trend. Dow Jones futures saw a rise in anticipation of President Trump addressing the nation regarding the Iran situation. Furthermore, the United Arab Emirates has expressed willingness to aid in the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

data.title: Ramtech Building Systems Executives to Present at 2026 World of Modular Convention
data.description: Matt Slataper, the President of Ramtech Building Systems, along with Kelly Williams, the Vice President of Business Development, are scheduled to co-present a session titled "Navigating Modular Construction: A Practical Roadmap for Architects & Developers." This presentation will be part of the Modular Building Institute's World of Modular event.

data.title: Base Carbon Reports Year End 2025 Operating and Financial Results
data.description: Toronto-based company Base Carbon Inc. (Cboe CA: BCBN) (OTCQX: BCBNF) released its year-end 2025 financial results. The company, operating under its subsidiary Base Carbon Capital Partners Corp., reported strong performance. Consolidated financials, in U.S. dollars, showed significant growth. The company expressed satisfaction with its operational achievements during the last fiscal year.
